academics.academic_context: My academic record was affected by substantial family caregiving responsibilities during my sophomore year. After reducing my work hours and adjusting my schedule, I completed my final three semesters with a 3.78 GPA, including strong grades in physiology, microbiology, and biochemistry.

experience_descriptions.clinical: I worked as a medical assistant in a community primary care clinic serving many uninsured and Spanish-speaking patients. I took vital signs, prepared patients for visits, assisted with referrals, and helped explain follow-up instructions in Spanish when appropriate.
experience_descriptions.research: I have not yet participated in formal research. My undergraduate responsibilities and work schedule limited my availability for laboratory work.
experience_descriptions.service: I organized health education events through a neighborhood community center. I coordinated blood pressure screenings, invited local health professionals, and created bilingual materials on preventive care and insurance enrollment.

goals.populations_of_interest: I am interested in serving Spanish-speaking, uninsured, and working-class families who experience barriers to consistent primary care.

additional_context: I would prefer to remain in California or the western United States, but I am open to mission-driven programs elsewhere.
